Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

Class BsonParser.SpacedHex

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.InputStreamParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonParser.SpacedHex
All Implemented Interfaces:
BsonMetaProvider, ArrayRecordReadable, RecordReadable
Enclosing class:
BsonParser
public static class BsonParser.SpacedHex extends BsonParser
Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
